publicClasses.brief: The per-thread reader state; placed on a difference cache line for each reading thread to avoid cache line thrashing.
publicClasses.name: batt::detail::ToggleReaderState
publicClasses.summary: The per-thread reader state; placed on a difference cache line for each reading thread to avoid cache line thrashing.
publicClasses.title: batt::detail::ToggleReaderState

publicClasses.brief: Writers leave a list of reader state snapshots (this struct) for any reading threads they suspect might be still using the old value when the Writer releases its exclusive lock.
publicClasses.name: batt::detail::ToggleReaderSnapshot
publicClasses.summary: Writers leave a list of reader state snapshots (this struct) for any reading threads they suspect might be still using the old value when the Writer releases its exclusive lock.
publicClasses.title: batt::detail::ToggleReaderSnapshot

publicClasses.brief: Synchronization primitive that provides highly scalable concurrent read access to state which is infrequently updated.
publicClasses.name: batt::Toggle
publicClasses.summary: Synchronization primitive that provides highly scalable concurrent read access to state which is infrequently updated.
publicClasses.title: batt::Toggle

publicClasses.brief: RAII-style Lock-free, wait-free reader critical section guard for Toggles.
publicClasses.name: batt::TypedToggleReader
publicClasses.summary: RAII-style Lock-free, wait-free reader critical section guard for Toggles.
publicClasses.title: batt::TypedToggleReader

publicClasses.brief: RAII-style Lock that grants exclusive write access to the future value of a [Toggle]().
publicClasses.name: batt::ToggleWriter
